center.name: Middle Magdalena Valley
center.summary: Middle Magdalena Valley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白背鬚鴷，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-mantled barbet is found in the Middle Magdalena Valley of Colombia at altitudes between . It is a bird of the tropical zone, inhabiting humid forests on montane slopes, forest patches with a mosaic of pastures, secondary forest, and plantations mixed with fruiting trees
